import io

fn lookup(_ key: String) -> Option<Int>
  match key
  when "one"
    Some(1)
  when "two"
    Some(2)
  when "three"
    Some(3)
  when _
    None
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(key)
  match lookup(key)
  when Some(n)
    println("value=#{n}")
  when None
    println("missing")
  end
when None
  println("missing")
end
